The Paris 2024 Olympic Games are said to be the first Games to achieve full gender parity. There are equal numbers of female and male athletes participating in the Games for the first time ever â that's 5,250 each. It took 128 years for the Olympics to achieve this goal. Is this a turning point for gender equality in sports? Click the video to find out!
